programme.title: Sin Island
programme.desc: After his wife seems to lose interest in him, a photographer travels to an exotic island where he begins a dangerous affair with a recently separated woman.

programme.title: Maria, Leonora, Teresa
programme.desc: Faith, Julio, and Stella are given life-sized dolls to cope with a tragedy, but the toys are controlled by a sinister master.

programme.title: I Think I'm in Love
programme.desc: Jonas, a womanizer, has a string of affairs with different young women. Tired of his lifestyle, his brother challenges him to be with a woman for three months without having any sexual contact.

programme.title: Kasunduan
programme.desc: August, an orphan, sheds off his compassionate and idealistic self once he enters the world of organized crime and becomes a criminal.

programme.title: #WalangForever
programme.desc: Mia, a celebrated scriptwriter, reaches a point in life where she does not believe in lasting love. However, her life turns upside down after her ex-boyfriend comes back to her.

programme.title: Mano Po 5: Gua Ai Di
programme.desc: A freewheeling veterinarian (Richard Gutierrez) tries to follow Chinese customs while wooing a tradition-minded Chinese woman (Angel Locsin).

programme.title: Sugatang Puso
programme.desc: A man and his second wife are forced to take in his difficult son from his previous marriage. When the son and the wife's son get involved in a car accident, life drastically changes.

programme.title: Pido Dida: Sabay Tayo
programme.desc: Pido and Dida grow up together in an orphanage and share a great bond with each other. Things change when their parents find them and they get separated.

programme.title: Can't Help Falling in Love
programme.desc: Two strangers accidentally get married.

programme.title: Rematado
programme.desc: A disgraced cop tries to make amends with his angry wife by getting her pawned wedding ring back, but after robbers steal the ring from the pawn shop, he is forced to track them down to save his marriage.

programme.title: Guwapings Dos
programme.desc: Three friends embark on an adventure together to try to overcome their personal demons in order to survive.

programme.title: Tar-San
programme.desc: Tar and San are formally declared as future chiefs of the Agatao tribe. However, they find an enemy in Sabukot, who has his eyes on the throne himself.

programme.title: Crazy Beautiful You
programme.desc: Jackie is taken on a medical mission to calm her rebellious spirit. When she arrives she meets Kiko, and the two discover something crazy and beautiful together.

programme.title: Can't Help Falling in Love
programme.desc: Two strangers accidentally get married.

programme.title: Home Along da Riles 2
programme.desc: Kevin, who struggles to raise his four children due to financial problems, suddenly becomes a millionaire. Then, he moves into a bigger house, which leads to hilarious situations.

programme.title: Ako ang Lalagot sa Hininga mo
My Candidate
programme.desc: Sonny, a promising young politician, works with Billie, a hotshot image consultant, to improve his senate campaign and soon falls in love with her.

programme.title: Ang Tanging Pamilya
programme.desc: A young woman accepts a marriage proposal from her long-distance boyfriend but has no idea their families will soon be at war.

programme.title: To Mama With Love
programme.desc: When a father abandons his family to move to the United States, the daughters take it upon themselves to care for their mother, especially after her health begins to deteriorate.

programme.title: Tunay Na Tunay: Gets Mo? Gets Ko!
programme.desc: Police officer Nick goes undercover as a cook and meets Tin Tin, a waitress. However, things take a turn when he discovers an unexpected truth.

programme.title: Lapu-Lapu
programme.desc: The first Filipino hero and the King of Mactan.

programme.title: Pamahiin
programme.desc: Ghosts follow a couple (Dennis Trillo, Iya Villania) home after they visit a funeral parlor to pay their respects to a deceased friend.

programme.title: Beauty in a Bottle
programme.desc: Three women struggle to cope with their insecurities and body image as they get caught up in the craze over a new beauty product.

programme.desc: Lainey (AJ Michalka) surprises everyone with her college announcement, prompting Barry (Troy Gentile) to vow to follow in the footsteps of Doogie Howser: M.D. and become a doctor while still in high school.

programme.title: America's Got Talent S21
programme.desc: With an army of loyal fans eager to find out what’s in store, America’s Got Talent returns to screens this year with more diverse talent, show-stopping moments and incredible drama than ever before.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Hosted by Daytime Emmy Award® winning host Steve Harvey, Family Feud brings all new hilarious moments and families as they compete for a chance to win up to $20,000 by guessing the most popular answers to questions posed to 100 people surveyed.

programme.title: Sheriff Country S1
programme.desc: When Skye becomes the prime suspect in a murder case, Mickey is forced to step down amid the investigation and launch her own off-the-books search for the truth.

programme.desc: Manny has a serious conversation with Bode about a troubling discovery, urging him to be honest and take responsibility.

programme.title: The Agency: Central Intelligence S1
programme.desc: Martian buys time with a bluff to Langley. Danny crosses the Rubicon.

programme.desc: The six chefs compete in a series of challenges to secure one of the five coveted Black Jackets from Chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Entertainment Tonight

programme.title: Celebrity Wheel Of Fortune S4
programme.desc: Hosted by Pat Sajak and Vanna White, "Celebrity Wheel of Fortune" welcomes celebrities to solve word puzzles for a chance to win up to $1 million. All of the money won goes to a charity of their choice.

programme.title: Sheriff Country S1
programme.desc: A high-stakes transport mission puts Sheriff Mickey Fox and Deputy Boone on edge as they race against time to protect a vulnerable witness.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: During a family cookout at a forest campsite, Charmcaster users her magic to switch places with Gwen, but when Ben catches 'Charmcaster' sneaking about, he attacks- unaware it's actually his cursed cousin!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3

programme.title: Real Time Crime (S2)
programme.desc: Investigators use surveillance video to uncover the secret behind a shooting.When a woman is murdered in her own home,police use the RTCC to track a killer close to home.

programme.title: Dual Survival (S5)
programme.desc: Matt and Joe start at the site of a plane crash off the shore of an uninhabited tropical island.

programme.title: Border Control: Spain (S7)
programme.desc: In Barcelona, the Civil Guard must confiscate some forbidden food from a passenger’s luggage. In Madrid, authorities find live eels in a suitcase.

programme.title: Border Control: Spain (S7)
programme.desc: At the Port of Algeciras, customs officers inspect a car full of toiletries. Meanwhile in Barcelona, a passenger undergoes an abdominal x-ray.

programme.title: Otto Bulletproof - Facing The Unknown (S2)
programme.desc: In the Everglades of Florida, Otto and Pascal Feyh hunt an invasive species of snake, the Burmese python, which can grow up to five metres long.

programme.title: Filthy Fortunes (S2)
programme.desc: Matt's team goes full hazmat suit to tackle a rat-infested hoard that is rumored to have cash hidden in every room -- if the rats haven't eaten it already.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters (S8)
programme.desc: Failing to find opal, The Mooka Boys embark on a risky mission at night. The Bushmen use a robot dog to help map out their underground mine.

programme.title: Gold Rush (S16)
programme.desc: Parker does the unthinkable to get all of the Golden Mile's paydirt. Rick's mechanic Ryan considers leaving. Mike Beets finally fires up on the hill.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch (S11)
programme.desc: The most menacing storm of opilio season moves in on the fleet. A rogue wave terrorizes the Cape Caution, ripping steel and timber.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch (S11)
programme.desc: A 600-mile-wide arctic storm continues to ravage the fleet. Rookie skippers Jake Anderson and Josh Harris struggle just to keep their heads above water.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch (S11)
programme.desc: A second major storm slams the fleet. Rookie skipper Jake Anderson reaches out to Sig Hansen for help. Josh Harris arrives on the grounds weeks late.

programme.title: Otto Bulletproof - Facing The Unknown (S2)
programme.desc: In Florida, dark tiger pythons were introduced from Asia as pets and now pose a threat to the ecosystem. Otto and Pascal track them down.

programme.title: Junk Or Jackpot? (S1)
programme.desc: Bobby Berk is on a mission to lasso a woman's massive Wonder Woman collection so it fits her home, making room for the peaceful life she deserves.

programme.title: Junk Or Jackpot? (S1)
programme.desc: A couple's record collection has taken over their home, and with Bobby's help, they're ready to sell some vinyl to fix their forever home.

programme.title: Gold Rush (Specials) (S16)
programme.desc: Rick, Parker and Kevin Beets face off in the first-ever rookie mine boss showdown to determine who is the top first-year miner.

programme.title: Gold Rush (S16)
programme.desc: Rick's shaken by his find at the bottom of Valhalla. Tony bears down on his 6,500-ounce goal. Parker taps Brennan for a big job at the Golden Mile.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters (S8)
programme.desc: The Bushmen’s plan to connect old underground drives calls for a huge drill. Slim Pickings face disaster when their rickety tractor breaks down.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold (S13)
programme.desc: As Shawn takes advantage of an unexpected deal, Zeke must pivot his strategy when the Tomcod claim proves dangerously inaccessible.

From bustling markets to tranquil beaches, she immerses herself in local traditions, learns from talented chefs, and creates mouthwatering Malaysian dishes in exotic locations.

programme.title: In Search of Heat S2 - EP 4
programme.desc: Kevin meets a Michelin chef who uses a fermented fish to prepare two of Isan’s spiciest dishes. Next, he winds up in Chaiyaphum to help a celebrity prepare a special spicy dish for an annual festival.

From bustling markets to tranquil beaches, she immerses herself in local traditions, learns from talented chefs, and creates mouthwatering Malaysian dishes in exotic locations.

programme.title: SHERO - EP 13
programme.desc: At the banquet, a guest suddenly attacks Feihong and injures him. Meihua captures the attacker and reveals that he was hired by Gina to target her. Feihong confronts Meihua and she admits to engaging in illegal transactions with Gina. Ruixiang secretly listens in on Jun Sheng and finds out that the man who was after Yin Xi is a professional assassin named Mercy...

programme.title: SHERO - EP 14
programme.desc: Meihua orders Ah Biao to eliminate Gina. The police inform Yinchen of Yinxi's whereabouts. The SHERO team is delighted, and Yinchen makes plans to go to Australia immediately. Mercy finds Yinxi before Yinchen does, and attempts to kill her, but Yinchen and the others arrive just in time to stop him. As they question Mercy about the mastermind, Mercy gets shot by a sniper...

programme.title: The Blood of Youth - EP 17 少年歌行
programme.desc: Aspiring young hero Lei Wu Jie was on his way to the great Xue Yue City when he mistakenly strayed into the Fallen Snow Villa. His first heroic deed does not go as planned since he ended up owing the owner Xiao Se a debt for the damages to his place. Left with no choice, Lei Wu Jie takes Xiao Se along. On their journey, they meet Tang Lian who is a disciple of the Tang sect. Together, the group of youths embark on an adventure.

programme.title: The Blood of Youth - EP 18 少年歌行
programme.desc: Aspiring young hero Lei Wu Jie was on his way to the great Xue Yue City when he mistakenly strayed into the Fallen Snow Villa. programme.title: C. L. I. F. 5 - EP 3 警徽天职之海岸卫队
programme.desc: In a class gathering, Man Ting met Jess who just came back from abroad. Jess's speech towards Man Ting was filled with sarcasm as she has never liked Man Ting all along. Jess is the Vaccine Research and Development Expert and when her classmates prompted her on her new findings, she refused to reveal anything. Quy Vuong contacted Guo Tai asking them to meet with Jess for a deal and to kill her once it is completed.

programme.title: C. L. I. F. 5 - EP 4 警徽天职之海岸卫队
programme.desc: Jess met with Man Ting and while Man Ting was on the phone, Jess placed a USB containing the vaccine program into Man Ting's bag, and purposely created an argument by bringing up long-standing problems and left. Thereafter, Jess was found dead in Pulau Ubin. Man Ting, being the last to see her, became the suspect.

programme.title: King Of Culinary - EP 7 三把刀1
programme.desc: Tonight, a graceful retiree Patricia finds her way here. She has a gentle personality but is undoubtedly a great cook. With chicken as today's theme, will she be able to defeat the chef of her choice? Another challenger Tai Boon Heng, who is a pastry chef, comes forward hoping to make his father and daughter proud. Will he be able to do so? And what strategies will the chefs come up with in order to defend their knives? Will Chef Eric Neo be able to uphold his reputation of "No losses"?

programme.title: Frontline - EP 14 前线追踪
programme.desc: Nearly 30 years after disappearing from Singapore, pork blood curd is back. One month on, has the excitement lasted? We look at consumer demand, supply shortages, food safety, and what it took to bring this traditional ingredient back to the table.

programme.title: No Other Way - EP 5 至死不渝
programme.desc: Shuheng and Victor find Junlei at an internet café. Junlei admits to dismembering Jenna’s body but denies murdering her. The police locate her final body part, and confirms the fatal wound was on Jenna’s thigh, inflicted by a knife in the villa. A bracelet then points to Julian as the killer. Just as Victor’s team sets out to arrest him, Hongtao brings Julian in to surrender.

programme.title: Talk of The Town - EP 69 狮城热话
programme.desc: A half-hour talk-show segment in Hello Singapore which brings together diverse voices and expert opinions to thought-provoking discussions on wide range of issues. Is Britain failing to find the right leader, or are leaders trapped by the same constraints?
